title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the future of remote work and work-life balance.

questions.question: How important do you think it is for employees to have the option to work from home?
Do you think people's attitudes towards remote working will change in the future? Why or why not?
Some people say it's harder to build a team spirit when everyone works remotely. Do you agree?

script.text: How important do you think it is for employees to have the option to work from home?
Do you think people's attitudes towards remote working will change in the future? Why or why not?
Some people say it's harder to build a team spirit when everyone works remotely. Do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
